title: Bitcoin Price Prediction as BTC Breaks Above $80,000
description: The Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) price has been stuck below $80,000 for the past three months. Every push toward the $80K level has been rejected so far, with BTC pulling back anytime it gets above $79,000. Then in the early Singapore hours today, the $80K resistance finally cracked, with BTC pushing past it to hit $80,500—its ... Bitcoin Price Prediction as BTC Breaks Above $80,000
